div.h3: Intel Manual Quality Specification - WAL Record Layout

ol.li: Fixed Header: Write lsn to prev_lsn (24 bytes).
Identity: Write page_id and offset (12 bytes).
Footer: Compute CRC32 over all previous bytes and append.
Integrity Check: Extract CRC32, recalculate over buffer, and compare.
Header Parse: Read fixed-width fields into local stack.
Structure Assembly: Populate Parsed Struct fields.

ul.li: Stage 3: Caller MUST call wal_free_record(parsed) to prevent leaks.
